sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Delay Trap
feat.text: You try to jam the workings of a trap to delay its effects. Attempt a Thievery check to Disable a Device on the trap with the following results instead of the normal ones for the action.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

archetype.name: Archaeologist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Delay Trap at a different level than displayed here.

feat.trigger: A trap within your reach is triggered
feat.critical_success: You either prevent the trap from being triggered or delay the activation until the start or end of your next turn.
feat.success: As above, but the GM chooses whichever is worse for you.
feat.critical_failure: You're off-guard until the start of your next turn.
